basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Software Test Engineer / Automation Tester Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Software Test Engineer / Automation Tester Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details and relaxation criteria.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B.Tech / MCA / M.Sc (Computer Science) or an equivalent postgraduate degree.
qualification.details: Software Test Engineer/ Automation Tester: B.E / B.Tech / MCA / M.Sc (Computer Science) or an equivalent postgraduate degree with 2 to 4 years of relevant testing experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month (Based on experience)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on information provided in online applications Test/Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Software Test Engineer / Automation Tester Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.text: Software Test Engineer/ Automation Tester: B.E / B.Tech / MCA / M.Sc (Computer Science) or an equivalent postgraduate degree with 2 to 4 years of relevant testing experience.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Software Test Engineer / Automation Tester Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Software Test Engineer / Automation Tester Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Software Test Engineer / Automation Tester recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Software Test Engineer / Automation Tester position at IIT Madras is 22nd July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E / B.Tech / MCA / M.Sc (Computer Science) degree or an equivalent postgraduate degree in a relevant field to be eligible for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Software Test Engineer / Automation Tester role?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Software Test Engineer / Automation Tester at IIT Madras as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month, which will be determined based on their relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website and fill out the application form, upload necessary documents, and submit it before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the official notification, no application fee has been mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates can proceed with their application without any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Software Test Engineer / Automation Tester post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their online applications, followed by a test and/or an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Software Test Engineer / Automation Tester at IIT Madras is a temporary role, as indicated in the official job notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct link to download the official notification PDF is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. What is the work location for this job?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Indian Institute of Technology Madras, located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
